svg.title: SPSC lock-free ring buffer architecture diagram
svg.desc: Structural diagram of a single-producer/single-consumer lock-free ring buffer, showing cache line layout, memory ordering, and data flow between producer and consumer threads.

g.text: head_ on CL₀ (core 0 L1, MESI: Modified) | tail_ on CL₁ (core 1 L1, MESI: Modified) | 64-byte padding between
relaxed load → L1 slot write → release store
≈ 5–30 ns | zero syscalls | zero kernel mode
No mutex → no lock contention or priority inversion
No CAS → no retry loops on contested writes
No kernel → no OS scheduler preemption
_mm_pause() loop → reduces speculation pressure | adaptive: yield only after N-iteration threshold | never sleep()
